title: EU biotech champions struggle with finance, says Euronext Brussels CEO [Advocacy Lab]
summary_full: Benoît van den Hove tells Euractiv that scaling biotech companies at a global level still depends on capital that Europe does not yet mobilise at sufficient scale
summary_public: Benoît van den Hove tells Euractiv that scaling biotech companies at a global level still depends on capital that Europe does not yet mobilise at sufficient scale

BE.label: negative
BE.evidence: EU biotech champions struggle with finance, says Euronext Brussels CEO
